name: alis-build
description: Connect Codex to Alis Build through MCP tools and workspace context.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to Alis Build through MCP.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Alis Build through MCP tools, OAuth authentication, and workspace-aware build and deploy operations.
defaultPrompt: Use Alis Build to inspect the current workspace and build status.
Use Alis Build to review recent build failures and suggest the next action.
